rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 27, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiff's Motion for Order Granting Leave to File First Amended Complaint is granted pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 473(a)(1). As of the date of the granting of Plaintiff's motion, the First Amended Complaint is deemed served on all Defendants who have previously appeared. Defendant Triple A Machine Shop, Inc.'s request to continue the trial date may be brought by separate noticed motion. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/CML)
